meta.title: Discovery One — HAL Deck Generation Pipeline
meta.purpose: Batch-generate a consistent 78-card tarot deck for Leonardo, Midjourney, Flux, or Gemini Imagen, then upload via CMS.

styleGuide.summary: 1970s deep-space oracle deck aboard Discovery One. Clinical white corridors meet cosmic mysticism. HAL red as accent only — never dominate the frame.

border.description: Thin double-line frame: outer white 2px, inner red 1px, 8px corner brackets like CRT telemetry. Consistent margin on every card.

motifs: Subtle circular HAL lens reflection in upper third (optional, small)
Starfield or grid telemetry in background — never busy
Roman numerals for Major Arcana bottom-centre
Suit pip count visible for Minor Arcana
styleGuide.symbolism: Symbolic and archetypal — avoid photorealistic human faces. Silhouettes, masks, or gloved hands acceptable. No copyrighted HAL dialogue or exact film stills.
styleGuide.negativePromptGlobal: text, watermark, logo, blurry, low quality, duplicate border, inconsistent frame, modern UI, smartphone, anime chibi, gore, nudity, extra fingers, misspelled titles

phase1_styleLock.description: Generate 5 test cards. Reject until border, palette, and tone match. Save the winning seed/settings as master reference.
acceptanceCriteria: Readable suit/arcana identity at thumbnail size
HAL red used as accent only
No text garbling in card title area

phase2_majorArcana.description: Batch all 22 Major Arcana using locked style reference.

phase3_minorArcana.description: Generate one suit at a time (14 cards × 4 suits = 56). Re-use suit colour coding.

checks: Correct pip count or court rank
Visual consistency with phase1 reference set
phase4_qa.reRollOnly: Cards that fail QA — do not regenerate the full deck

phase5_normalizeAndUpload.naming: slug.png in Cards-png/ or CMS bulk upload
phase5_normalizeAndUpload.cardBack: Roses_and_Lilies_back.jpg or custom back matching style guide
phase5_normalizeAndUpload.cmsRoute: /cms — bulk upload deck, then assign to deck module

leonardoBatchTips.problem: Leonardo UI is painful one-at-a-time without structure.
suggestions: Use Leonardo Image Guidance / Style Reference: upload your best phase1 card as fixed reference.
Create a spreadsheet or this JSON — one row per card — paste prompt column into Leonardo in batches of 5–10.
Leonardo API (if on paid tier): script POST requests with shared modelId + styleReferenceAssetId.
Alternative: export prompts from scripts/generate-deck-prompts.mjs (see repo) and batch in Leonardo Bulk Create if available.
Keep a 'reject' folder; only promote QA-pass cards to final/

promptTemplate.structure: {stylePrefix} Tarot card illustration, {cardTitle}, {arcanaOrSuitContext}. {symbolismNotes}. {styleGuide.border.description}. Palette: void black background, panel white frame, HAL red accent. 2:3 vertical card. {negativePromptGlobal}
promptTemplate.stylePrefix: 1970s sci-fi oracle deck, Discovery One aesthetic, retro-futuristic, cinematic lighting,

variables.cardTitle: Display name e.g. The Fool, Ace of Cups
variables.arcanaOrSuitContext: Major Arcana number {n} OR {rank} of {suit} ({element} element)
variables.symbolismNotes: Rider-Waite symbolic composition reinterpreted in space-mission visual language

examplePrompts.the-fool: 1970s sci-fi oracle deck, Discovery One aesthetic. Tarot card The Fool, Major Arcana 0. Youth at cliff edge replaced by astronaut at airlock threshold, small cosmic dog companion, white space suit, starfield. Thin double-line white border, red corner brackets, small HAL lens glint upper third. 2:3 vertical. No text.
examplePrompts.the-magician: 1970s sci-fi oracle deck. Tarot card The Magician, Major Arcana I. Figure at telemetry console, four suit symbols as holographic icons on table, red lens accent. Consistent white/red border frame. Symbolic not photorealistic face. 2:3 vertical. No text.
examplePrompts.ace-of-cups: 1970s sci-fi oracle deck. Ace of Cups, water element. Grail as crystalline fluid reservoir floating in zero-G, teal lunar glow, starfield. Matching border frame from style reference. 2:3 vertical. No text.
examplePrompts.ace-of-swords: 1970s sci-fi oracle deck. Ace of Swords, air element. Single blade as beacon antenna piercing cloud nebula, cold grey geometry. Matching border frame. 2:3 vertical. No text.
examplePrompts.ace-of-pentacles: 1970s sci-fi oracle deck. Ace of Pentacles, earth element. Coin as copper circuit disc with orbital ring, oxidised metal glow. Matching border frame. 2:3 vertical. No text.
